CustomField.formula: SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & ParentTerritory2.Name & " >> " & Name , " >> >> ", " >> "), " >> >> ", " >> "), " >> >> ", " >> ")
CustomField.label: fxTerritoryTree
